rows.title: 20V Cordless Dry Hand Vacuum (Tool only)
rows.description: The DEWALT 20V Cordless Dry Hand Vacuum (Tool only) is a jobsite cleaning solution that provides users with powerful performance (46 CFM) to pick up common jobsite debris ranging from drywall, dust, to small screws and nails. This versatile vacuum comes with 6 different cleaning attachment accessories to tackle any cleaning job from floor level to overhead. The hand vacuum can be used to handle smaller messes or used in combination with the extension tube and floor accessory to clean up floor areas. A bright LED light illuminates the darkest areas. A HEPA Filter allows for clean efficient cleanup of fine dust and drywall and follows OSHA Table 1 Compliance under houskeeping rules. It comes fully equipped with an extension tube, floor nozzle, flexible hose, crevice nozzle, gulper brush, round brush, belt hook, accessory holder, and HEPA filter. Battery & Charger Sold Separately Up to 21.4 mintues of runtime per charge using DCB205 battery (sold separately). Can fill up to 15 tank fills per charge using DCB205 battery (sold separately).
features: 46 CFM provides higher suction performance for more efficient clean-up
65 Air Watts with a 5.0Ah DCB205 battery pack (sold separately).
6 Accessory cleaning solutions
additional_features: Drawstring accessory bag keeps vacuum accessories in one place.
Easy empty canister to minimize exposure to dust and debris.
HEPA Filtration allows for clean and efficient cleanup of fine dust like concrete and drywall.
A bright LED light illuminates the darkest areas.
The belt hook frees up hands to work more efficiently.
applications: Vacuuming jobsite debris like wood dust, saw dust, wood chips.
Vacuuming jobsite debris like drywall, dust, and small screws.
Vacuuming jobsite debris like small screws, nuts, dried caulk, electrical wire insulation, and electrical wire cuttings.
Vacuuming vehicle debris like food crumbs, small stones, pebbles, grass, small pieces of plastic, and paper.
Vacuuming floor debris like food crumbs, small stones, pebbles, grass, small pieces of plastic, and paper.

rows.title: 20V MAX* 1/2 Gallon Wet/Dry Portable Vac (Tool Only)
rows.description: The 20V MAX* 1/2 Gallon Wet/Dry Portable Vacuum runs off all 20V MAX* battery packs for long runtime. The HEPA wet/dry filter traps 99.97% of dust at 0.3 microns. Dual clean-up modes allow for debris removal with either the front utility nozzle or extendable rubber hose. The portable vacuum is easy to use with a heavy duty tank latch for emptying and cleaning, a large on/off switch for one-hand access, and a heavy-duty rubber hose that provides durability and flexibility. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Gore HEPA wet/dry filter traps 99.97% of dust at 0.3 microns
Dual clean-up modes allow for debris removal with either the front utility nozzle or extendable rubber hose
1/2 gallon tank with heavy-duty latch is easy to empty and clean
additional_features: Washable filter; Tap or water rinse to clean
Heavy-duty rubber hose provides durability and flexibility
Large on/off switch that is easy to access with one hand
Runs off of 20V Max DEWALT battery packs for long run-time
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.

rows.title: 18/20V MAX* Cordless Wet-Dry Vacuum
rows.description: The DCV580 18/20V MAX* Cordless Wet-Dry Vacuum is powered by an 18V or 20V MAX battery to suck up to 2 gallons of wet or dry mess. Includes a flexible hose, accessory storage, and a durable, heavy-duty construction.
features: Cordless operation powered by either an 18V or 20V MAX* battery
Easily accessible, washable/reusable filter; tap or water rinse to clean
Heavy-duty, crush-resistant, fully-integrated 5' (by 1-1/4" diameter) hose provides durability, flexibility, and ease-of-use
additional_features: On-board hose and accessory storage makes the vacuum easy to carry/transport
2-Gallon tank capacity provides enough storage to empty a toilet or clogged pipe
HEPA rated wet/dry filter traps dust with 99.97% efficiency at 0.3 microns
31 CFM
includes: (1) 5' Heavy-Duty Crush Resistant Hose (1-1/4 in. Diameter)
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.

rows.description: Vacuum up to 2 gallons of wet or dry debris with the 20V MAX* Cordless Vacuum. The integrated flexible, heavy-duty 5 ft. hose is ideal for tough worksite conditions. Battery and charger sold separately.

Easy Filter Maintenance - Easily accessible, washable, and reusable filter

rows.title: 20V MAX* Cordless/Corded Wet-Dry Vacuum (Tool Only)
rows.description: Go battery powered or outlet powered with the DEWALT DCV581H Wet-Dry Vacuum. It uses a 20V MAX* battery (sold separately) - or you can plug it in to an AC outlet. This DEWALT vacuum has the capacity to vacuum 2 gallons of wet or dry debris. The integrated flexible, heavy-duty 5 ft. hose is ideal for tough worksite conditions and has the option to attach a crevice tool or wide-nozzle tool (included). This unit comes with a filter that can be rinsed and reused. .
features: Cordless or Corded - Power option
Plenty of Storage - 2-gallon tank capacity provides enough storage to empty a toilet or clogged pipe

rows.title: FLEXVOLT 60V MAX* Cordless Dust Extractor (Tool Only)
rows.description: Running off of the FLEXVOLT 20V/60V MAX*battery, the DCV585 cordless Dust Extractor is an efficient and portable way to achieve OSHA Table 1 compliance on the jobsite. This product features Wireless Tool Control with remote, allowing the user to activate the extractor from the tool, at a distance. It also features a automatic filter cleaning mechanism and includes HEPA filters. The FLEXVOLT 20V/60V MAX* battery powers our full range of 60V MAX* tools, and it's backwards compatible to work with 20V MAX* tools. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: 125 CFM provides OSHA Table 1 Compliant Solutions for up to 5 in. Tuckpointing and Surfacing Applications when paired with an appropriate dust shroud
Automatic Filter Cleaning, with Dual Filters
HEPA Filter Included with Unit
additional_features: Wireless Tool Control Allows for wireless ON/OFF capability when paired with the included Remote or a Wireless Tool Control Enabled Tool
T-Stak Compatibility Allows Unit to be Stacked and Combined with other DEWALT T-Stak Storage Systems
8 Foot Long Anti Static Hose with DEWALT AIRLOCK system
Built in hose wrap offers convenient hose storage when not in use
Meets the EPA Lead Related Renovations, Repair, and Painting (RRP) rule for HEPA vacuums when used with the included HEPA filter
Can be used with Wet or Dry applications

rows.title: Wall-Mounted Wet/Dry Vacuum with Wireless On/Off Control (6 gal)
rows.description: Clean up messes quickly on the jobsite or in the workshop with the 6 gal. Wall-Mounted Wet/Dry Vacuum with Wireless On/Off Control. Save space in your work area by mounting this Wet/Dry Vacuum on the wall and using the 20 ft. hose to reach exactly where the spill or leak has occurred. Its ease of use is enhanced by its tool box shape, easy-carry handle, and remote on and off while its heavy-duty motor delivers realiable, professional-grade performance.
features: Preserve floor space with included wall mount
Optimized for convenience: Turn device on and off remotely
High portability: Easily maneuver around your worksite
additional_features: Designed for low noise output with integrated muffler
Access hard-to-reach areas: Extra-long, flexible hose reaches up to 20 ft. while the vac remains mounted with 10 ft. power cord
includes: (1) Flexible Hose up to 20 ft. DXVA19-2601
applications: Portability to take to job site

rows.title: Portable Wet/Dry Vacuum (6 gal) (4 HP)
rows.description: Our 6 Gallon, 4 HP Wet/Dry Vacuum is portable and convenient for small jobsite cleanups. With a powerful, heavy-duty motor, it provides strong suction for jobsite cleaning. It features a fine-dust cartridge filter for small, dry debris and wet materials, a handle for easy carrying, large on/off switch with water-resistant design for quick access, and built-in 10 ft. power cord. An onboard accessory bag keeps your attachments and tools organized. Swiveling casters provide easy movement in any direction. A built-in tank drain makes emptying liquids easy.
features: Ideal for smaller jobsite cleanups
Powerful 4 peak horsepower motor provides strong suction
Rubberized casters allow smooth swiveling for easy movement
additional_features: 10 ft. power cord with cord wrap provides reach and neat storage
Built-in blower port powerful enough to blow sawdust and debris from most workshops
Accessories included:1-7/8 in. x 7 ft. hose, 2 extension wands, washable & reusable cartridge filter, floor nozzle, utility nozzle, crevice nozzle, disposable filter bag & mesh accessory storage bag

rows.title: 9 Gallon, 5 HP Wet/Dry Vacuum
rows.description: The 9 Gallon Wet/Dry Vacuum is built for jobsite cleanups. It's easy to transport and features a powerful, heavy-duty motor for maximum performance. Strong suction delivers the performance you need for tough jobs. It features a fine-dust cartridge filter for small, dry debris and wet materials, a handle for easy carrying, large on/off switch with water-resistant design for quick access, and convenient, built-in 10 ft. power cord. Keep attachments and tools organized with the onboard accessory bag. Swiveling casters provide ease of movement in any direction while a built-in tank drain makes it easy to empty liquids.

Powerful 5 peak horsepower motor provides strong suction
Rubberized casters allow smooth swiveling for ease of movement
additional_features: 10 ft. power cord with cord wrap helps reach almost any cleanup need
Built-in blower port powerful enough to blow sawdust and debris from most workshops

Built-in accessory storage bag conveniently attached to keep all accessories neatly organized

disclaimers: Tank capacity refers to actual tank volume and does not reflect capacity available during operation.Peak Horsepower" (PHP) is a term used in the wet/dry vacuum industry for consumer comparison purposes. It does not denote the operational horsepower of a wet/dry vacuum but rather the horsepower output of a motor, including the motor's inertial contribution, achieved in laboratory testing. In actual use, motors do not operate at the peak horsepower shown.

rows.title: 10 Gallon, 5.5 HP 2-Stage QUIET Wet/Dry Vacuum
rows.description: Our 10 Gallon, 5.5 HP 2-Stage QUIET Wet/Dry Vacuum features a QUIET 2-stage motor for up to 50% quieter operation and 2X longer life. The powerful motor delivers maximum suction power when you need it for heavy-duty cleanups. It features a washable & reusable cartridge filter for small, dry debris and wet materials. A carrying handle for easy transport, large on/off switch with water-resistant design, and built-in 10 ft. power cord make this rugged, mobile unit ideal for jobsite use. An onboard accessory bag keeps your accessories/tools organized. Swiveling casters provide easy movement, and a built-in tank drain makes emptying easy.
